title: Japanese-Style Spring Sausage Ozoni
description: A hearty, comforting Japanese-inspired soup made with spring sausage, ozoni, and other savory ingredients.
instructions: In a large pot, heat sesame oil over medium heat.
Add sliced ginger and cook for 2 minutes.
Add sliced spring sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add sliced polish sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add sliced mushrooms and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add ozoni, green onions, soy sauce, and 4 cups of water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
